title: Money and Shipwrights
description: The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Luffy, Paulie, Sanji, Nami, Usopp. The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: We probably have to replace the mast...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hold on a minute!! Who are you!!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh. Sorry, did I wake you up?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hehe. Don't understand- mate our carpenters...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Their boundaries combined are worth239 million beri.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Their name is the straw hat pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I am the head of this city...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You're not exactly a model mayor...

summary: The crew meets Water Seven’s elite shipwrights while Iceburg and Galley-La become central to the Merry’s future.
